caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a green t-shirt is seated in a studio setting. His t-shirt features white text that reads "I CON NEVER DO SHIT ETWORK". He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. Behind him is a white wall decorated with several framed photographs and a white mannequin wearing a white shirt. To the right, clothing racks with various garments are visible. Small logos are present in the bottom corners of the scene, including one that reads "BULLY BELLY". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, slightly shifting his facial expression and head posture while appearing to speak into the microphone. The background elements, including the photos, mannequin, and equipment, remain static as he talks.
